mapper.select: select q.id, q.stem, q.question_type_id, qt.name as question_type_name, q.difficulty, q.score, q.updated_at from question q inner join question_type qt on qt.id = q.question_type_id where order by q.id asc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from question q inner join question_type qt on qt.id = q.question_type_id where
select count(1) from question where question_type_id = #{questionTypeId} and deleted = 0
